grafana.workspace.idpmetadata.CfnAbout: A structure containing the identity provider (IdP) metadata used to integrate the identity provider with this workspace. You can specify the metadata either by providing a URL to its location in the `url` parameter, or by specifying the full metadata in XML format in the `xml` parameter. Specifying both will cause an error.

grafana.workspace.idpmetadata.Url.Description: The URL of the location containing the IdP metadata.

grafana.workspace.idpmetadata.Xml.Description: The full IdP metadata, in XML format.
